rule_metadata.name: chinapic_zip
rule_metadata.description: Find zip archives of pony panels that have china.jpg
rule_metadata.author: Brian Carter

rules.rule_text:
rule chinapic_zip
{
	meta:
		description = "Find zip archives of pony panels that have china.jpg"
		author = "Brian Carter"
		last_modified = "March 31, 2017"

	strings:
		$txt1 = "china.jpg"
		$txt2 = "config.php"
		$magic = { 50 4b 03 04 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and all of ( $txt* )
}
